title: rubus × affinoides
intro: Rubus × affinoides, also known as the hybrid raspberry or Rubus affinis, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from a cross between the species Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × affinoides lie in its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × affinoides include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system, due to its high levels of vitamins, minerals, and fiber. Rubus × affinoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make jams, preserves, and other food products.
